Department Of INFO TECHNOLOGY
Saturday
II BSC IT (2024-2025)
~ M. SUGANYA
: Project Guidelines for Students 1) Do Not Start the Project in SkillWallet Students should not start the project in the SkillWallet portal. The projects listed there are only for reference to check the project titles and descriptions shared in the documents. 2) Use the Appropriate External Platform Students must complete the project on the external platform related to the technology. Examples: ServiceNow Projects – Use the ServiceNow Instance Salesforce Projects – Use the Salesforce Platform MongoDB Projects – Use VS Code Gen AI with Google Projects – Use Google Colab Agentic AI Application Developer (IBM) – Use Google Colab 3) Follow the Project Development Recordings Students should watch the project development recording sessions and complete the project step-by-step by following the instructions shown in the recordings. 4) Download the Recording if It Does Not Play If the recordings are not playing online, students can use the download option and watch the recording offline. 5) Use the Shared Project Documents The project documents drive link has already been shared. Students should refer to these documents to understand the step-by-step process of the project. 6) Understanding Milestones A Milestone in the project represents a Task. Each Task contains Activities, which are the steps that need to be completed for that task. 7) Technical Queries If students face any technical issues or errors, they can: Post their query in the Telegram group, or Contact the trainer directly. 8) Uploading the Project to GitHub After completing the project, students must upload the project files to GitHub. The following items must be uploaded: Coding Files (if the project contains code) Project Document – Students must create their own project summary document explaining the project. 9) Demo Video Submission Once the project is fully completed, students must record a demo video by screen recording their project and explaining the project workflow and implementation. 10) Share Links with Faculty After completing the above steps, students must share with the faculty: GitHub Repository Link Demo Video Link 11) Where to Upload the Files Project files should be uploaded to GitHub. Demo video should be uploaded to Google Drive. Students do not need to submit the files anywhere else. 12) Faculty Submission in Portal Faculty members will submit the GitHub link and Demo Video link in the project portal, where team formation and project assignment were done. 13) Team Project Submission This is a team project. Only one team member can upload the project to GitHub and upload the demo video to Google Drive. The same links can then be shared with the faculty.

Hello Everyone! We’re launching a new 30-Day Artificial intelligence Masterclass batch. If you have friends, juniors, or classmates who are interested in learning Data Analytics, please feel free to share this opportunity with them. Many students missed the previous sessions due to exams and other commitments — this is your second chance to join. Registration Link: https://webinars.novitechrd.com/free-30-days-ai-challenge Let’s help more students learn valuable skills and build their careers! Kindly share this with at least 2 friends who should not miss this opportunity.

II YEAR ARABIC 2024-25 BATCH
3/2/2026
~ arabteacheraja272014@
: I (a) Choose the correct Answer ( 4x 1 =4 )  1. What is meant by " النقطة" ?  a) The full stop b) The king c) The queen d) Full stop  2. What is meant by رسائل?  a) Prophet b) Allah c) Letters d) Letter  3. What is meant by My dear father?  أبي العزيز (d (والدي العزيز(c (والدتي العزيزة(b (العزيزي والدتي  4. What is meant by" القوسان) "?a) Semi colon (b) Paranthesis (c)Inverted comas (d) Comas  (b) Fill in the blanks ( 5 x 1 =5 )   5. The meaning of the word " التاريخ" is …………….  6. Letter writing is an _____ .  7. The meaning of the word "المملكة العربية السعودية " __.  8. The meaning of the word in Arabic “Signature” ___.  9. 10/02/2025 write in Arabic pattern ___.  (c) Answer the following questions (3 x 2 = 6)   10. Write the English equivalent for “Formal invitation to a wedding”   ادعو هللا أن يخفف احزانك سريعا" "translate into English 11.  12. “I am extremely sorry” translate into Arabic ?  Section – B (3 x 5 = 15)  II - Answer any three questions.  13. Translate the following into Arabic:  “My dear father, Assalamu Alaikum Varahmathullahi Wa barkathuhu, A team of students in   the college are going on an excursion to Bangalore, under the supervision of the teachers. The   tour may last for one week”.  14. Translate the following into Arabic:  “My dear son, Assalamu Alaikum Varahmathullahi Wa barkathuhu , I have received your   kind letter dated 13.02.2025 and I am extremely pleased with it. May god protect you. I must   advise you in this connection, that your companions should be good fellows and that your tour   should not take more than week. “.  15. Translate the following into Arabic:  My dear Mathew, I am in dire need of Rs500/- as my younger son is not well request to   send me he same through the bearer. Thanking you.  16. Write the 5 past tense sentences in Arabic with meaning.  17. Write 5 present tense sentences in Arabic with meaning.  Section – C (2 x10 = 20)  18. Define “The Structure of Letter” in English  19. Write the Letter from father to son in Arabic.  20. Write 10 sentences of your own in Arabic.
